## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes introduced in this PR. Mention any issues this PR resolves.

## Checklist
* [ ] I have verified my changes using the interactive test menu: `python run_tests.py`
* [ ] All new functions include explicit Python type hints.
* [ ] No raw or hardcoded secrets/API keys are introduced.
* [ ] Standard imports are formatted cleanly.
* [ ] Visual/HTML layout templates compile correctly (`preview_email.py`).

## Screenshots / Console Output
If visual/terminal adjustments were made, please copy-paste console output or attach screenshots.
